stories.title: Blacksmith building can be placed
stories.description: As a player, I can place a Blacksmith building on the town grid. The Blacksmith has a footprint of 2x2, costs 80 gold, and attracts fighters and soldiers.
acceptance_criteria: place_building type=blacksmith succeeds in headless simulation
Blacksmith appears in buildings.json data with correct id, cost and footprint
Blacksmith.tscn scene file exists and is loadable
